basic_details.job_title: DHSGSU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya, Sagar (DHSGSU) Recruitment 2026: Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya, Sagar has released the official notification for 1 Project Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Relaxation in age is permissible for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in science / 3 years Diploma in Engineering & Technology, M.Sc./M.Tech degree in Geology/Applied Geology/ Earth Science with at least 55% marks for GN/OBC (50% for SC/ST/PH) from UGC recognized University/ Institutes within last two years (i.e. on or after 2024)
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in science / 3 years Diploma in Engineering & Technology, M.Sc./M.Tech degree in Geology/Applied Geology/ Earth Science with at least 55% marks for GN/OBC (50% for SC/ST/PH) from UGC recognized University/ Institutes within last two years (i.e. on or after 2024).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHSGSU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHSGSU Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DHSGSU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DHSGSU Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Bachelor's degree in science / 3 years Diploma in Engineering & Technology, M.Sc./M.Tech degree in Geology/Applied Geology/ Earth Science with at least 55% marks for GN/OBC (50% for SC/ST/PH) from UGC recognized University/ Institutes within last two years (i.e. on or after 2024).

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Relaxation in age is permissible for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Government of India rules.

content_sections.heading: DHSGSU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DHSGSU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHSGSU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHSGSU Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the DHSGSU Project Assistant position is 21st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's degree in science or a 3-year Diploma in Engineering & Technology. An M.Sc./M.Tech in Geology/Applied Geology/Earth Science with specific marks is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant post is 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 27,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the DHSGSU Project Assistant job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with required documents to the specified email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview, which may be conducted in a blended mode.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya located?
faq.answer: Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya is located in Sagar, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 470003.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job for the Project Assistant position is on a contractual basis.
